name: rtm
prompt:
Analyze this RTM (Real-Time Marker) trading chart. Extract ALL visible box prints and horizontal level lines.

Return a JSON object with this exact structure:
{
  "symbol": "ES or /ES or detected symbol",
  "date": "YYYY-MM-DD (from chart date if visible)",
  "boxes": [
    {
      "time_et": "HH:MM",
      "price": 6500.25,
      "color": "blue|red|green|yellow|orange|purple|unknown",
      "number": "7020 or null if not visible",
      "dash_tag": "-2- or null if not a dash-tagged box"
    }
  ],
  "lines": [
    {
      "label": "Strongest Morning Level or Strongest Afternoon Level or other",
      "start_time": "HH:MM",
      "price": 6500.25
    }
  ],
  "price_range": {"min": 6400.0, "max": 6600.0},
  "confidence": "high|medium|low",
  "notes": "any observations"
}

Rules:
- Boxes are small colored rectangles or markers at specific price/time locations
- Extract the EXACT price and time for each box as read from the chart axes
- Color is critical — blue and red boxes have different meanings
- Dash-tagged boxes have a "-2-" label near them — these are directional signals
- Lines labeled "Strongest Morning Level" (SML) or "Strongest Afternoon Level" (SAL) are key anchor prices
- Times should be in Eastern Time (ET) as shown on the x-axis
- Prices should match the y-axis scale exactly
- If a box or line is partially obscured, include it with your best estimate and note low confidence
- Return ONLY the JSON object, no other text
